title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 29.
content:
There was an Old Man of the Wrekin,
    Whose shoes made a horrible creaking;
    But they said, "Tell us whether,
    Your shoes are of leather,
    Or of what, you Old Man of the Wrekin?"
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 29." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
